extra.reasoning: The mutual-exclusion property NOT(rec_drug_a AND rec_drug_b) is VIOLATED. rec_drug_a is set true only by rec_a_from_conjunction (priority 50), whose condition is the conjunction of all 8 inputs including polypharmacy. rec_drug_b is set true by rec_b_from_trigger (priority 50) whenever polypharmacy is true. The condition for rec_drug_a is a strict superset of the condition for rec_drug_b: any input that fires the conjunction necessarily has polypharmacy true, so rec_b_from_trigger also fires. No rule ever sets rec_drug_a or rec_drug_b to false, and the defaults only apply to outputs left unset (so they cannot override a fired rule). Therefore setting all 8 conjunction inputs true makes both rec_drug_a and rec_drug_b true simultaneously. elderly is immaterial (set false here; it only affects rec_drug_c). Concrete counterexample: polypharmacy=bradycardia=renal_impairment=qt_prolongation=immunosuppressed=hyperkalemia=hepatic_impairment=peptic_ulcer=true, elderly=false yields rec_drug_a=true and rec_drug_b=true.
